title: The Mandela Catalogue: Alternates
description: The Alternates have invaded the world of Minecraft!
body:
Welcome to The Mandela Catalogue: Alternates mod for Minecraft Forge 1.20.1!

This mod adds Alternates from the famous YouTube series by Alex Kister. Alternates for more creatures are planned.

The Alternates are immune to nearly all types of Damage! The only way to kill them is to light them on fire. Sure would be a shame if one enters your wooden house

A bit of info, this mod is still a massive Work In Progress. Bugs are to be expected. Please let me know your feedback!

Credits: Alex Kister (For making The Mandela Catalogue) Microsoft (for Minecraft) and Modrinth itself.
